resources.string: ART Hook detection + Stack frame analysis
Auto start app on boot or scheduled time
Auto start only works in exported APK. Some phones require granting auto start permission in system settings.
✅ All permissions ready, auto start will work properly
Keep running in background after exit
Prevent system sleep, keep background tasks running
Show running status in notification bar
🔋 Disable battery optimization for reliable auto start, tap to open settings
Force control for volume, lights, performance, etc.
⚠️ Warning: Enabling the above features may cause device heating, rapid battery drain, etc. Please understand the risks before enabling. Some features require special permissions to work.
The following features may affect the device, use with caution ⚠️ Only supported on some devices, effects vary
Auto start this app after device boots
Inject micro-frequency offsets into audio analysis data
Intercept matchMedia to spoof prefers-color-scheme / prefers-reduced-motion
Open built-in diagnostic page showing all fingerprint vectors
Multi-layer anti-fingerprinting to make WebView undetectable
Inject noise into measureText to prevent font fingerprinting
Auto-propagate disguise into newly created iframes
Polyfill missing Notification API and spoof permission state
Reduce performance.now() precision to prevent timing attacks
All hooked functions return [native code] via toString

The Browser Disguise Engine modifies browser fingerprint API return values via JS injection. Level 1 (basic anti-detection) is always active, covering WebView marker removal and window.chrome emulation. Higher levels progressively add Canvas/WebGL/Audio noise, environment spoofing, and prototype chain protection. Note: excessive disguise levels may affect some website functionality.
Replace GPU renderer/vendor info with standard PC values
Block RTCPeerConnection from leaking local IP addresses
Reflection + Dynamic proxy for critical calls
Prevent MITM attacks, pin server certificates
Open system settings to change default WebView (Developer Options required)
Are you sure you want to clear all hosts rules?
Start countdown after launch, auto exit when time ends
Format: on_ms,off_ms,on_ms,off_ms... Example: 100,100,100,100,100,800 = triple flash + long dark
Are you sure you want to delete this script?
This will delete all downloaded runtimes and cache. They will need to be re-downloaded. Continue?
Affects download speed for PHP, WordPress & Node.js
Detect if developer options are enabled
Detect network proxy and VPN connections
Settings → About Phone → Tap "Build Number" 7 times
Detect which black tech features this device supports
Manually configure device name, model and resolution
Select a device to auto-generate matching browser fingerprint and User-Agent, making websites believe you are browsing with that device.
Disguise as different devices to browse
Scramble code execution flow, hinder static analysis
Verify DEX integrity at runtime, detect hot-patching
Encrypt classes.dex, dynamically decrypt at runtime
Split DEX into encrypted fragments, reassemble on demand
Convert critical code to custom instruction set, randomized per build
Disguise as system app, cannot be uninstalled normally
No limit — higher count = greater impact
Show multiple app icons on desktop after installation
Set the number of icons to display on desktop (each icon can launch the app)
Multi-icon feature uses Android native activity-alias mechanism, automatically showing multiple desktop icons after installation, no extra permissions required.
Download standalone engine to embed in exported APKs
Set password to allow emergency exit
Inject fake data to mislead reverse engineers
Wipe all sensitive data under severe threats
Using GeckoView will increase APK size by ~%s MB
Are you sure you want to delete the engine files?
GeckoView engine not downloaded. Please download it from Browser Kernel page first.
Embedded Firefox engine with privacy protection & ad blocking
Select browser engine for exported APK
Uses built-in Android WebView, zero extra size
Play a game while waiting for network
Choose a beautifully designed built-in style
Enter your custom HTML page code
Display a custom image or video
Page shown when network is unavailable
⚠ Exact alarm permission required for on-time launch, tap to open settings
Force run during fixed time period, auto exit when time ends
Screen goes black and touch disabled
Disconnect all Bluetooth devices and turn off Bluetooth
Disable cellular network (requires system permission, not supported on all devices)
High CPU usage, drains battery and heats up
Prevent screen from turning off automatically
Programmatically create WiFi hotspot, auto-adapts to Android version
Force app to run during specified time, cannot exit

Warning: After enabling forced run, the app cannot be exited during the specified time. Please set an emergency password just in case. This feature is suitable for focused learning, parental control, etc.
Standard + VMP + Control flow + RASP + Memory protection
Basic + SO protection + String encryption + Env detection
Block ad domains using hosts files
Block ad domains by importing hosts files Supports standard hosts format and AdBlock format
These browsers may support being WebView provider

Isolated environment creates a separate browser environment for each app, including random fingerprint, forged headers and IP spoofing, effectively preventing website tracking and detection. Suitable for multi-instance and anti-association scenarios.
Action menu when long pressing web content
No long press menu, use system default
Circular bubble menu at tap position
Only save image and copy link
HMAC tag critical data, periodic verification
Create multiple launcher shortcuts, deleting any one removes all
No scripts matched for this page
Explore the script market to find useful scripts
All-in-one: Max volume + Max vibration + Strobe + Full performance + Block keys
📱 %s system detected. Please add this app to auto-start whitelist in phone manager to prevent system from blocking auto start
Inject always-true/false conditions + junk code paths
Compress PNG/JPEG images, supports WebP conversion
Convert PNG/JPEG to WebP, 30-50% size reduction
Cache optimized resources to avoid reprocessing
Defer off-screen images, accelerate first paint
Minify JS/CSS/SVG, remove comments and whitespace
Auto-add defer attribute, prevent render blocking
Process resource files in parallel using multi-core CPU
Inject preconnect/dns-prefetch hints for faster resource loading
Remove unnecessary language packs and default resources from template
Inject scroll optimization, memory management, CDN preconnect scripts
Comprehensive app optimization: resource compression, build acceleration, loading speed
After installing, select as WebView provider in Developer Options
Generate new fingerprint on each app launch
Verify SHA-256 hash of resource files
Auto start this app at specified time

The current launcher may not support creating shortcuts. Please check home screen settings or app permissions.
Click \'Go to Settings\' to open the app details page and check for relevant permission options.

Detected Huawei/Honor phone. You need to enable \'Create Desktop Shortcut\' permission.
Go to: Settings > Apps > App Management > WebToApp > Permissions > Create Desktop Shortcut

Detected Meizu phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission.
Go to: Phone Manager > Permission Management > WebToApp > Desktop Shortcut

Detected OPPO phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission.
Go to: Settings > App Management > WebToApp > Permissions > Desktop Shortcut

Detected Samsung phone. Please ensure the home screen is unlocked for editing.
You can also long-press the app icon and select \'Add to Home Screen\' to create a shortcut.

Detected vivo phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission.
Go to: i Manager > App Management > Permission Management > WebToApp > Desktop Shortcut

Detected Xiaomi/Redmi phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission to create app shortcuts.
Go to: Settings > App Settings > App Management > WebToApp > Permission Management > Desktop Shortcut
Multi-layer memory protection with mprotect + inotify
Remove real symbols, inject honeypot fake symbols
Filter internal details, prevent logic inference
All-hidden: Mute + Black screen + Block touch + Disable WiFi + Disable BT
Supported: China, USA, Japan, Korea, UK, Germany, France, Russia, Brazil, India, Australia, Canada, Singapore, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Europe, Asia
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
Select userscripts to enable for this app
Note: Changing WebView provider requires Developer Options enabled
Block real IP leakage through WebRTC
